findings.issue: Missing object ownership filter on invoice lookup
findings.evidence_span: target.md: cancel_invoice checks is_authenticated, loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering, and the denial body returns invoice_id.
findings.recommended_fix: Add tenant_id or owner_id filtering when loading the invoice to ensure the authenticated user owns the invoice before returning it.

findings.evidence_span: target.md: cancel_invoice checks is_authenticated, loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering, and the denial body returns invoice_id.
findings.recommended_fix: Return a generic error message in the denial body instead of including the invoice_id to prevent information disclosure.
